title: get_homepage_serving
description: Verify that a GET request to / returns a 200 status code and serves the index.html page for the homepage without requiring authentication.

title: get_services_page_serving
description: Verify that a GET request to /services returns a 200 status code and serves the services.html page without requiring authentication.

title: get_works_page_serving
description: Verify that a GET request to /works returns a 200 status code and serves the works.html page without requiring authentication.

title: get_about_page_serving
description: Verify that a GET request to /about returns a 200 status code and serves the about.html page without requiring authentication.

title: get_contact_page_serving
description: Verify that a GET request to /contact returns a 200 status code and serves the contact.html page without requiring authentication.

title: get_dashboard_page_serving
description: Verify that a GET request to /dashboard returns a 200 status code and serves the admin-dashboard.html page without requiring authentication.

title: post_contact_form_valid_submission
description: Verify that a POST request to /api/contact with valid name, email, phone, service, and message fields returns a 200 status code with a success response confirming submission.

title: post_contact_form_invalid_submission
description: Verify that a POST request to /api/contact with missing or invalid fields returns a 400 status code with an error message explaining the validation failure.

title: post_newsletter_valid_subscription
description: Verify that a POST request to /api/newsletter with a valid email address returns a 200 status code with a success response confirming subscription.

title: post_newsletter_invalid_subscription
description: Verify that a POST request to /api/newsletter with an empty, invalid, or missing email field returns a 400 status code with an error message explaining the email validation issue.
